## Article
**Article Title / Folder:** 

## Issue Type
- [ ] Branding / Terminology (Px vs Pixals)
- [ ] Factual Accuracy / Misinformation
- [ ] Outdated Information
- [ ] Development Status Language (should be presented as complete)
- [ ] Alignment with docs.pixeljourney.xyz
- [ ] Cross-linking / Further Reading
- [ ] Tone / Quality / Clarity
- [ ] Other

## Description

Describe the issue in detail.

## Suggested Fix

How should this be addressed?

## Priority
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low
